beer.beer_description: We've bottled the anticipation, the rush, the freedom to drop it all! Lagered longer for that little bit extra and brewed naturally with real Saaz hops and all Aussie malted barley – no added sugar, tetra hops, additives or preservatives. The ultimate mid-strength, thirst quenching brew that revels unashamedly in it’s natural state.

items.badge_description: One cannot live on dank hops alone. Tone down the bitterness and enjoy some smooth flavor. That's 105 different beers with an IBU of 20 or below. Try 5 more for Level 22!
After a long day, what better way to kick back than with a crisp and refreshing lager? You're already feeling more relaxed, aren’t you?. That’s 100 different Lagers! Try 5 more for Level 21!

items.badge_description: Congrats, you've unlocked the World Pint 2026: Australia badge! Keep checking in beers to score badges from the other 47 countries competing in the world's biggest football competition. Keep up to date on future badges by following us on social @untappd!
It's New Brew Thursday! Drink any beer you have never had before on three different Thursdays in a 20 day period.

items.badge_description: Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 185 distinct venues!

items.badge_description: Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 320 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 65!
